name: pact-agents
description: 24 Pact/KDA-CE skills, 8 role-based agents, 18 instruction files, and CI scripts for Kadena smart contract development.

interface.shortDescription: Pact 5 / KDA-CE smart contract development skills and agents
interface.longDescription: Domain-specific skills and role-based agents for Pact 5 smart contract development on Kadena Community Edition. Covers capabilities, guards, schema design, REPL testing, devnet workflows, security audit, gas analysis, cross-chain design, and more.
